name: Fishy Fries
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the canned salmon and flake it. Set aside.
2. In a bowl, combine flour with seasoning and vegetable oil. Gradually beat in milk or water until smooth and thick.
3. Whisk egg whites until stiff and fold into the batter along with the salmon flakes.
4. Heat enough sunflower oil for frying in a deep fat fryer over moderate heat.
5. Carefully drop tablespoons of the salmon batter into the hot oil (cook 4-5 at a time depending on your fryer's size). Keep prepared fries warm in a low oven while cooking others.
6. Turn each salmon fry over after about 45 seconds to brown the other side. Use plenty of oil for frying; the batter needs room to rise and move around.
7. Remove the fries with a slotted spoon when golden brown on all sides and drain on absorbent kitchen paper.
8. Serve hot with tomato sauce or tartar sauce.
Serves 6-8. Approx. 220 kcals per serving
